positive: A stylized, minimalist design featuring a crescent moon cradling a cluster of luminous stars and celestial flora. The scene should be rendered in a highly contrasting, elegant black silhouette against a deep midnight blue background. Focus on clean, crisp outlines and strong graphic shapes, designed for optimal apparel print placement. Incorporate subtle geometric patterns within the constellations and gentle, ethereal glow effects around the flora. Aspect ratio should emphasize symmetry and central composition. Vector art quality, high contrast, clean lines, magical realism, modern esoteric style.
negative: blur, grain, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, low quality, messy, sloppy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, distracting elements
